name: Abdominal Support
shortDescription: Medical-grade abdominal binder for post-surgery recovery, hernia support and core stability.
longDescription: Aligno Abdominal Support provides firm yet comfortable compression around the abdomen and lower back. Ideal for post-operative recovery, mild hernia support, pregnancy-related discomfort and daily core stability. Made with breathable, skin-friendly elastic fabric that stays in place without rolling.

name: Ankle Support
shortDescription: Lightweight ankle brace for sprains, swelling and sports injury prevention.
longDescription: Aligno Ankle Support wraps securely around the ankle joint to limit excessive movement while allowing natural mobility. Perfect for ankle sprains, ligament strain, swelling and preventive support during walking, running and sports activities.

name: Cervical Collar
shortDescription: Soft cervical collar for neck pain, whiplash recovery and posture support.
longDescription: Aligno Cervical Collar gently immobilizes the neck to relieve muscle strain, cervical spondylosis discomfort and post-injury recovery. Contoured design with soft foam padding ensures comfort during extended wear while maintaining proper neck alignment.

name: Contoured LS Support Belt
shortDescription: Anatomically contoured lumbosacral belt with dual compression straps for lower back pain.
longDescription: Aligno Contoured LS Support Belt is ergonomically shaped to match the natural curve of your spine. Dual adjustable straps deliver targeted compression to the lumbar and sacral region, ideal for chronic lower back pain, disc discomfort and heavy lifting protection.

name: Elbow Support
shortDescription: Compression elbow sleeve for joint pain, arthritis and repetitive strain relief.
longDescription: Aligno Elbow Support provides gentle compression and warmth to the elbow joint. Helps manage arthritis pain, tendonitis, gym injuries and repetitive strain from typing or sports. Seamless knit design ensures a snug, non-bulky fit.

name: Functional Knee Support
shortDescription: Advanced functional knee brace with patella opening for active recovery and sports.
longDescription: Aligno Functional Knee Support features a patella opening, side stabilizers and 4-way stretch fabric for maximum support during movement. Designed for ACL/MCL mild instability, post-surgery rehab, arthritis and high-impact sports.

name: Knee Support
shortDescription: Classic knee sleeve for pain relief, swelling control and everyday joint support.
longDescription: Aligno Knee Support is a versatile compression sleeve that wraps the knee joint for pain relief, swelling reduction and warmth therapy. Suitable for arthritis, minor sprains, gym workouts and long hours of standing or walking.

name: LS Belt Eco
shortDescription: Economical lumbosacral belt for daily lower back pain relief and posture support.
longDescription: Aligno LS Belt Eco offers essential lumbar support at an affordable price. Wide elastic band with adjustable tension helps reduce lower back strain during sitting, driving, lifting and household chores. A practical choice for everyday back care.

name: Lumbar Sacral Support Belt
shortDescription: Premium lumbar sacral belt with rigid stays for chronic back pain and heavy work.
longDescription: Aligno Lumbar Sacral Support Belt combines firm elastic compression with semi-rigid stays to stabilize the lower spine. Recommended for chronic lumbago, sciatica support, warehouse work, driving and postpartum back care.

name: Pouch Arm Sling
shortDescription: Comfortable arm pouch sling for shoulder injuries, fractures and post-surgery immobilization.
longDescription: Aligno Pouch Arm Sling holds the arm securely in a elevated position to reduce shoulder strain after injury, fracture or surgery. Padded neck strap and breathable arm pouch ensure comfort during extended recovery periods.

name: Tennis Elbow Support
shortDescription: Targeted forearm strap for tennis elbow, golfer's elbow and tendon pain relief.
longDescription: Aligno Tennis Elbow Support applies focused pressure on the forearm extensor muscles to relieve pain from tennis elbow (lateral epicondylitis) and golfer's elbow. Compact strap design allows full arm movement while delivering effective pain relief.

name: Wrist Wrap
shortDescription: Elastic wrist wrap for sprains, carpal tunnel relief and typing strain.
longDescription: Aligno Wrist Wrap provides adjustable compression and stability to the wrist joint. Helps manage wrist sprains, carpal tunnel discomfort, repetitive strain from typing and light sports activities. Low-profile design fits under watches and gloves.

name: Wrist Wrap with Thumb
shortDescription: Extended wrist support with thumb loop for enhanced stability and pain relief.
longDescription: Aligno Wrist Wrap with Thumb extends support to both the wrist and thumb base (CMC joint). Ideal for De Quervain's tenosynovitis, thumb sprains, gaming/typing strain and post-injury recovery. Integrated thumb loop prevents slip and adds stabilizing support.
